quotes: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller
Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure clinical claims remain traceable to their substantiation and visually distinct from body copy for regulatory compliance.
rules.rule_text: Every clinical claim must carry a footnote marker (the dagger symbol, †) with its corresponding footnote text clearly separated from body copy and rendered noticeably smaller than body text, per substantiation requirement §1.2.

quotes: Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

rules.intent: Give patient testimonials a consistent, authentic, human presentation that is clearly attributed and visually supported.
rules.rule_text: Patient quotes must be attributed in the form "- [Name], LISRAYA patient", set in italic (patient_quote.text_style = italic) or otherwise visually distinguished, and always paired with warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery (image_treatment.photography.warm_lifestyle).

effect.subject: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI

quotes: all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

rules.intent: Preserve a single, locked source of truth for legal/regulatory elements and prevent duplicated or inconsistent legal copy elsewhere in the email.
rules.rule_text: The Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication statement, and ISI are exclusively owned by the locked header/footer (top_matter/end_matter) components and must never be reproduced within body sections.
